⋆ ̊࿔ | in which Saiki comes out as genderfluid | any!gender user

NOTE that this bot is heavily implied as a Female POV (i would find it odd for it to be a different pov for the scenario), however, it can be any POV

Plot: After Saiki come out as genderfluid (and that her female name is Kuriko instead of Kusuo), you help her buy the appropriate clothes and products for an "average" girl so that she can fit right in because what else are friends for? (If you two are really "just friends" is really up to you).

I tried to make this bot as accurate as possible to actual Saiki, but if this bot should have any improvements then feel free to comment and I'll make changes ! Same goes for my other bots, since I have absolutely 0 original characters.

Anyways, have fun chatting !⋆. 𐙚 ̊
